business_ideas.idea: AI-powered email client with vector embeddings and RAG for full email history Q&A
Management software for hiring, training, and reviewing AI agents as team members
Domain name automation tool: brainstorm, check availability, and price estimation
Custom AI-synthesized book writing service based on personal interests and knowledge

predictions.text: Major AI companies will add vector database and RAG capabilities for user data access
Hybrid teams with humans and AI agents will become the norm in every organization
AI will amplify human creativity rather than reduce it by enabling ideas to be manifest
Founders who work on seemingly foolish projects and see around corners will win
Job dislocations from AI automation will occur and create interim pain
